phrases.intent_en: Ask what the market's specialty is
phrases.text_local: Qu'est-ce qu'il faut goûter absolument ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: kess keel FOH goo-TAY ahb-soh-loo-MAHN ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: This is Paris's oldest covered market (1615). The Moroccan couscous stand and the Japanese bento stall are legendary. Come hungry — portions are generous.

responses.english: We are known for the prepared dishes. There is everything.
responses.phonetic: ohn eh koh-NOO poor lay plah kwee-zee-NAY. eel ee ah duh too
responses.french: On est connus pour les plats cuisinés. Il y a de tout.

phrases.intent_en: Ask to taste something before buying
phrases.cultural_note: Most vendors are happy to offer a taste, especially cheese and charcuterie stalls. Always ask first — just pointing and asking 'goûter?' with a smile works too.

responses.english: Yes, taste it, please go ahead.
responses.phonetic: wee, goo-TAY, zhuh vooz ahn pree
responses.french: Oui, goûtez, je vous en prie.

phrases.text_local: Je vais prendre le couscous royal, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh vay PRAHNDR luh koos-KOOS rwah-YAL, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: The couscous stand often has a line — it's worth the wait. 'Royal' means it comes with multiple meats (lamb, chicken, merguez). Grab a seat at the communal tables.

responses.english: Do you want to eat here or take away?
responses.phonetic: voo voo-LAY mahn-ZHAY soor plass oo ahm-por-TAY
responses.french: Vous voulez manger sur place ou emporter ?

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the market's opening hours
phrases.text_local: Le marché est ouvert jusqu'à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh mar-SHAY eh oo-VEHR zhoos-KAH kel UHR
phrases.cultural_note: Open Tuesday-Saturday 8:30 AM-8:30 PM, Sunday until 5 PM. Closed Monday. Lunchtime (12-2 PM) is the busiest — come at 11:30 for the best seating.

responses.english: We are open Tuesday to Sunday, eight thirty to eight thirty.
responses.phonetic: ohn eh oo-VEHR doo mar-DEE oh dee-MAHNSH, duh weet uhr trahnt ah vant uhr trahnt
responses.french: On est ouvert du mardi au dimanche, de huit heures trente à vingt heures trente.
